prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX5544R Gen II** turbocharger (hybrid billet wheel) for the **AM29 4.0L V8 twin-turbo (AE31)** engine, paired with **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** to handle 900+ HP on **Motul 300V 5W-40** full-synthetic oil. Retain the stock **Bosch MEVD17.2.9** ECU but reflash with **Alientech KESS3** Stage 3+ custom mapping for 22 PSI peak boost, optimized for **MagnaFlow Race 409 stainless steel 3.5" cat-back exhaust** with **Akrapovič downpipes (de-catted, 4" diameter)** and **Tial MV-R 60mm external wastegates** for precise boost control.

Install **Öhlins TTX46 MkII coilovers** with **AST-specific valving** (24-way compression, 22-way rebound adjustability) and **Eibach Pro-Race 3-way adjustable sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear)** to eliminate body roll. Pair with **AP Racing 6-piston front (400mm) and 4-piston rear (380mm) CCM-R carbon-ceramic brakes** with **Ferodo DS3000 pads** and **Goodridge 6AN stainless steel brake lines** for fade-free stopping power. Replace the stock **ZF 8HP95** transmission with a **ZF 8HP90X** (strengthened internals) and **South Bend Stage 3+ twin-disc clutch** for 1,000 Nm torque capacity.

Integrate a **Pectel SQ6M standalone ECU** with **Motec C127 dash logger** for real-time telemetry, paired with a **Nitrous Express GenX Direct Port 200-shot nitrous kit** (progressive controller, **10lb bottle with purge valve**) for on-demand power. Add **VRSF intercooler upgrade (5" thick core, 1,200 CFM airflow)** and **Mishimoto aluminum charge pipes (3.5" diameter)** to eliminate heat soak. Forced induction is cooled via **AEM 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump** with **ID1700x injectors** and **Radium Engineering dual fuel pressure regulators** for E85 compatibility.
estetica: Apply **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (DBX707-specific)** with **custom carbon fiber fenders (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear)** and **Vorsteiner V-FF 110 forged wheels (22x11 ET35 front, 22x12.5 ET40 rear)** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (295/30/22 front, 325/25/22 rear)**. The kit includes **RWB-style overfenders** and **custom aluminum rivets** for a seamless fitment.

Install **Seibon Carbon DBX707 GT3-style front splitter** with **adjustable carbon canards (3-piece, Gurney flap included)** and **custom rear diffuser (carbon fiber, 3-stage design)** by **Prior Design**. The rear wing is a **DRS-enabled GT3-spec unit (carbon fiber, 1.8m width, 300mm chord)** with **active Gurney flap (hydraulic actuation, 15mm travel)**. Paint in **Aston Martin Q-Satin Racing Green** with **3M Matte Black vinyl overlays** on the hood, roof, and side skirts.

Replace all exterior lighting with **Lux H8 Angel Eyes (RGB, 6,000K CCT)** and **Osram LaserLine D1S headlights (12,000 lumens)**. The interior features **Recaro Pole Position SPG XL seats (carbon shell, Alcantara/leather upholstery)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses** and **MOMO Mod.78 carbon steering wheel (350mm diameter, quick-release)**. The roll cage is a **Custom Cages T45 steel bolt-in (8-point, FIA-spec)** with **carbon fiber door cards** and **Alcantara headliner (stitched with Aston Martin logo)**.
